ead.archdesc:
======= RMM00097Fowler and Wells families papers97Compiled by M. E. Warren, et al.Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
June 20062B Carl A. Kroch LibraryCornell UniversityIthaca, NY 14853rareref@cornell.eduURL:

converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Fowler and Wells families papers
Fowler family.
Howe, Harlan L.
97
.9 cubic feet. .9 cubic feet.
1807-1968 1836-1901 Collection material in English Correspondence, articles, lectures, photos, printed matter, and other papers relating to the practice of phrenology by various members of the Fowler and Wells families, including Orson and Lorenzo N. Fowler, Samuel Roberts Wells, and Charlotte Fowler Wells. Includes material relating to "The Phrenological Journal" and "The Practical Phrenologist," periodicals with which the family was associated. Also includes a small number of Civil War letters. Also, originals and transcribed copies of the wills of Charlotte Fowler Howe and Charlotte Fowler Wells, and other letters. Correspondence, Photographs, Printed Materials. <<<<<<< HEAD 1 ======= 1 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab 2084323
Scope and content
Correspondence, articles, lectures, photos, printed matter, and other papers relating to the practice of phrenology by various members of the Fowler and Wells families, including Orson and Lorenzo N. Fowler, Samuel Roberts Wells, and Charlotte Fowler Wells. Includes material relating to "The Phrenological Journal" and "The Practical Phrenologist," periodicals with which the family was associated. Also includes a small number of Civil War letters. Also, originals and transcribed copies of the wills of Charlotte Fowler Howe and Charlotte Fowler Wells, and other letters.Correspondents include Susan B. Anthony, F.A.P. Barnard, Albert Barnes, Antoinette Brown, James Freeman Clarke, William H. Channing, John W. Edmonds, Frederick W. Evans, O.B. Frothingham, Frances Dana Gage, Sylvester Graham, Sarah Grimké, Bronson Howard, Horace Mann, Eliphalet Nott, George Ripley, Benjamin Silliman, George Francis Train, Moses Coit Tyler, Benjamin F. Wade, and Elizur Wright.
Scope and content
Howe-Fowler Family letters, bound volume of transcribed letters by Harlan L. Howe. Also The Dr. Parker Birthday Book, selected and arranged by Amelia M. Flower and give by her to Abitha Howe, with birthdays of Howes and Fowler family members noted. Includes handwritten family chart by Harlan L. Howe and notes on additional individual noted in the book.
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
M. E. Warren, et al.
Date completed:
1999
EAD encoding:
Peter M. Martinez, June 26, 2006
Date modified:
Kristen Reichenbach, April 2018
Cite As:
Fowler and Wells families papers, #97. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Related Materials
A PDF with additional details is available upon request.
Existence and Location of Copies
Microfilm reel 1 contains copies of original physical material.
SERIES LIST
Series I. Correspondence and Family Papers
Series II. Photographs
United States -- History -- Civil War, 1861-1865. Phrenology. Practical phrenologist. Phrenological journal. Fowler, O. S. (Orson Squire), 1809-1887. Fowler, L. N. (Lorenzo Niles), 1811-1896. Wells, Samuel R. (Samuel Roberts), 1820-1875. Wells, Charlotte Fowler, 1814-1901. Anthony, Susan B. (Susan Brownell), 1820-1906. Barnard, Frederick A. P. (Frederick Augustus Porter), 1809-1889. Barnes, Albert, 1798-1870. Blackwell, Antoinette Louisa Brown, 1825-1921. Clarke, James Freeman, 1810-1888. Channing, W. H. (William Henry), 1810-1884. Edmonds, John W. (John Worth), 1799-1874. Evans, F. W. (Frederick William), 1808-1893. Frothingham, Octavius Brooks, 1822-1895. Gage, Frances Dana, 1808-1884. Graham, Sylvester, 1794-1851. Grimké, Sarah Moore, 1792-1873. Howard, Bronson, 1842-1908. Mann, Horace, 1796-1859. Nott, Eliphalet, 1773-1866. Ripley, George, 1802-1880. Silliman, Benjamin, 1816-1885. Train, George Francis, 1829-1904. Tyler, Moses Coit, 1835-1900. Wade, Benjamin F. (Benjamin Franklin), 1800-1878. Wells family.
